pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires the project to be named "TemperatureConverter".
Task description explicitly requires creating the project at "C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\".
Task description explicitly requires naming one TextBox "txtCelsius".
Task description explicitly requires naming the other TextBox "txtFahrenheit".
Task description explicitly requires naming the Button "btnConvert".

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic WinForms application. All UI element names (txtCelsius, txtFahrenheit, btnConvert) and the project name (TemperatureConverter) along with its destination path (C:\\Users\\Docker\\source\\repos\\TemperatureConverter) are explicitly defined in the task description and perfectly match the expected metadata.
